\backmatter
\printindex

%% Author index
% Generated by: bash make-authorindex.sh  (after PDF compile)
% Redefine theauthorindex for single spacing (per authorindex docs)
\renewenvironment{theauthorindex}{%
  \linespread{1}\selectfont%
  \setlength{\parskip}{0pt}%
  \raggedright%
  \setlength{\leftskip}{1em}%
  \setlength{\parindent}{-1em}%
  \def\item[##1]{\par\hspace{0mm}\ainame{##1}}%
  \aisize}{\par}
\addcontentsline{toc}{chapter}{Author Index}
\chapter*{Author Index}
\begin{multicols}{2}
\printauthorindex
\end{multicols}
